title: Dense Kenyan Tomatoes Tagine
description: Rich and flavorful dish from Kenya made with cherry tomatoes and a sweet and tangy ferment-jang sauce. Perfect for a date-night dinner.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large slate-tile vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for another minute.
Add the cherry tomatoes, ferment-jang, ground cumin, ground coriander, salt, and black pepper. Stir well to combine.
Bring the mixture to a simmer and cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Use a spoon to mash some of the tomatoes against the side of the vessel to release their juices.
Continue to simmer for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
